name: opencode-android-tdd
description: OpenCode plugin that enforces strict Red-Green-Refactor TDD on Android/Kotlin projects via a code-enforced gate.
author: Milad Shabani

scripts.spike: npm run build && node spike/run-classifier.mjs && node spike/run-doctor.mjs && node spike/run-machine.mjs && node spike/run-gate.mjs && node spike/run-plugin.mjs && node spike/run-tools.mjs && node spike/run-buildedit.mjs && node spike/run-install.mjs && node spike/run-quality.mjs
